transcription.text: I can't forget the night we met. I knew I found the one. We met right here at the candy store. Now every night I'm back to pick up my one and only Hello Luscious. Kit Kat. There's a crispy crunch inside every creamy chocolate bite for a taste you can fall in love with. Kit Kat, I love you. Chocolatey crispy Kit Kat. The taste you can fall in love with.

metadata.title: 1980 KitKat Candy Bar I Can't Forget the Night We Met
